description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test that runs on workflow dispatch, push to any branch except markdown files, pull requests except markdown files, and on completion of a Test schedule workflow run on the master branch. The workflow has read permissions for repository contents and pull requests. It includes two jobs: test and deploy. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.9-3.12, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests with coverage. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, needs the test job to succeed, and deploys to GitHub Pages on the master branch.
